claim: For a 4096x4096 fp32 matrix transpose on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, shared-memory tiled transpose measured 22.077017x faster than the naive strided-write baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: lower shared-memory bank conflict rate from padded tile
curation_note: timing-only: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment. Treat bank-conflict and memory-transaction notes as expected signals until counter-backed evidence is attached.
